response.original_title: Add Passenger Guide-How do I add a guest or passenger to my Princess cruise Complete 2026 Guide
response.overview: To add a guest to an existing Princess cruise, you must call Princess directly +1-866-829-1280 (US) or contact your travel agent, as additions cannot be made online. Call +1-866-829-1280 (US) or +44 (204) 586-5316 (UK) with the new guest's full name, date of birth, and passport details ready. Additions depend on cabin capacity, +1-866-829-1280 (US) ship occupancy, and may trigger a re-price to current rates. Method: You cannot add a guest via the app or website; you must call Princess Customer Service (1-866-829-1280 for US). To add someone to a Princess cruise room, you must call Princess directly at +1-866-829-1280 (US) or 44-204-586=5316 (UK) or contact your travel agent, as this cannot be done through the app or website. Additions depend on cabin capacity, +1-866-829-1280 (US) ship availability, and require paying current rates. Add guests at least one week before sailing, +1-866-829-1280 (US) as bookings typically close 48 to 72 hours before departure.
response.title: Add Passenger Guide-How do I add a guest or passenger to my Princess cruise Complete 2026 Guide
